head: de14577
blocked_scope: credential plaintext exposure or key retrieval
DB schema, migration, or model changes
training wrapper, package, export, or playground runtime changes
desktop UI beyond generated OpenAPI client updates
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M2-003 is pushed. This scope implements M2-004 hard_negative generation/counting/lifecycle metrics on the existing dataset_gen worker and focused tests.

phase_notes.plan: Implement M2-004 only: require/count at least 40 schema-valid hard_negative examples in teacher_synthetic dataset_gen output, include hard_negative_count in metrics, enforce same review lifecycle, and keep raw prompts/examples out of JobEvent payloads.
phase_notes.audit: Read M2 handoff, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE M2-004 Done/tests/job params, ARCHITECTURE source enum, and existing M2-003 worker/test structure.
phase_notes.build: In progress: extend job params, worker validation/source handling, fake teacher fixtures, generated OpenAPI types, and hard-negative tests.
phase_notes.check: Pending: task JSON, py_compile, focused pytest, OpenAPI export, import boundary, and diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: Pending: update WORKING closeout, commit, and push after verification passes.

pabcd.approved_scope: M2-004 hard_negative generation/counting/metrics/tests within listed paths.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No credential plaintext, DB schema/model/migration, benchmark report code, training, package, export, playground, docs/spec/foundation/mockup/handoff/review, or desktop UI work beyond generated OpenAPI client.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
